name: Flower of Lust
original_name: ร่านดอกงิ้ว
overview: The woman is fooled in love by some guy, later gets pregnant with his child. He left her with madness. For revenge, she set her daughter in love with him. They don't even know that they're biologically father and child

trailers.title: (Teaser) ร่านดอกงิ้ว | เริ่ม 4 มกราคมนี้ ทางช่อง8
